nasb.text: Others were saying, “This is he,” still others were saying, “No, but he is like him.” He kept saying, “I am the one.”

esv.text: Some said, “It is he.” Others said, “No, but he is like him.” He kept saying, “I am the man.”

cnv.text: 有的說：“是他。”有的說：“不是他，只是像他。”他自己說：“是我。”

ccb.text: 有人说：“是他。”有人说：“不是他，只是长得像他。” 他自己说：“我就是那个人。”

csbs.text: 有的说：“是这个人。”有的说：“不是，只是像他。” 那个人自己说：“就是我。”
